description: Schema for emotion-aware video dubbing training and evaluation data

example_record.source_text: I can't believe this is happening.
example_record.target_text: मुझे विश्वास नहीं हो रहा कि यह हो रहा है।
example_record.context_prev: Everything was normal a few minutes ago.
example_record.speaker: speaker_01
example_record.localization_notes: Natural Hindi expression preferred over literal translation.

language_pair.description: Source-target language pair in ISO format joined by underscore

source_text.description: Original transcript text in source language

target_text.description: Human-verified or model-generated translation in target language

emotion.description: Dominant emotion of the source segment (Ekman 6 + neutral)

intensity.description: Emotion intensity as a confidence score from the emotion classifier

context_prev.description: Text of the immediately preceding segment (for contextual translation)

context_next.description: Text of the immediately following segment

speaker.description: Speaker identifier (e.g. speaker_01). Used for voice consistency tracking.

gender.description: Perceived gender of the speaker for TTS voice selection

domain.description: Content domain — used for domain-adapted translation fine-tuning

localization_notes.description: Free-text notes for human translators or post-editors on cultural adaptation

quality_score.description: Human quality rating (1=poor, 5=excellent). Used for training data filtering.

augmented.description: True if this record was synthetically generated or augmented, false if human-verified
